free_text: Measurements of the fission cross section of 239Pu by
neutrons with energy from 10 eV to 100 keV
Set of NWI-62 proportional counters filled with
BF3 (82.3% B-10) for neutron spectrum measurement.
100-200 eV range (1831+/-41.8 b*eV) by averaging some
experimental results normalized to thermal cross
